functions.name: find_object
functions.description: Find a specific object in images or videos based on the user query.

functions.name: count_object
functions.description: Count the number of specific objects in images or videos based on the query.

functions.name: object_action_detect
functions.description: Detect actions or behaviors of specific objects in images or videos.

functions.name: transcribe_audio_from_video
functions.description: Transcribe audio content from videos into text.

functions.name: search_similarity
functions.description: Find images, frames, or transcripts that are semantically similar to the input query.

functions.name: generate_description
functions.description: Generate a brief description of the content in the image or video.

functions.name: generate_multimodal_report
functions.description: Generate a comprehensive report from video, including frame descriptions, transcriptions, and summaries.
